name: Harlequin and Jester
description:
☆/ Rainy afternoon

By Harlequin's stubbornness, both he and Jester ended up waiting under the exterior roof of a random house waiting for the rain to pass, and while they waited, the human they both knew offered to let them pass to his home to pass in a warm place while the rain stopped, how would the three of them live together in the same place?

Bot requested?

Yes / No

Heya! This bot was requested by someone who asked for the same version of the other bot in malepov but in fempov, so I took it out earlier since I was planning to release it anyway!

I hope that the bot correctly meets the expectations of the persoms who requested it and is liked by the general public.

Just like I said in the previous bot, the next bot will be Pierrot, so please stay tuned!
